chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1556 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at alga 2. For hearing of main case 24.11.2025 Mr. Ghulam Shabbeer Shar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for respondent-University Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General ************** After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the appeals preferred by the petitioner for grant of his promotion, available at page Nos. 99 and 101, have not yet been decided by the Vice Chancellor, SALU Khairpur. He states that he would be satisfied, and seeks disposal of the present petition, if the Vice Chancellor of SALU Khairpur is directed to decide the referred appeals as early as possible in accordance with law. Learned counsel representing the respondent University as well as the learned AAG concedes to such proposal. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of with directions to the Vice Chancellor, SALU Khairpur, to decide the petitioner’s appeals preferably within a period of one month, strictly in accordance with law and submit such report to this Court through Additional Registrar of this Court for perusal in Chamber. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
